title.rendered: 101 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Best Practices: A Checklist for Nonprofits

content.rendered:
101 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Best Practices for Nonprofits is a blog series that covers the fundamentals of website and email marketing, online fundraising, and social media for nonprofits.

This checklist of 200+ digital marketing and fundraising tasks will help your nonprofit get organized and implement the best practices featured in the series. The checklist includes:

  • Website and email marketing
  • Donation pages and online fundraising including monthly giving, tribute giving and donor retention
  • Social media including Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, and X
  • Content marketing and strategy for nonprofits

Download Now!

Email address not required!

The 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program provides an honest, balanced approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2026 and onward. Customized for nonprofit professionals, this webinar series will expand your skill set, advance your career, and help transition your nonprofit into the age of AI.
